name: memory
description: Cross-session memory retrieval with relevance scoring

name: brainstorming
description: Structured ideation and divergent-thinking facilitation for Belief and Design phases.

name: design
description: Gate 3 design brief facilitation: decision log, option analysis, risk table, and client sign-off checklist.

name: context
description: Context budget zone management for long sessions

name: review
description: Stage-1 spec-drift review — compare diff against Belief + Expectation Map + PLAN + Trust Tier, return PASS / BLOCK / FLAG-FOR-HUMAN

name: existing-product-kit
description: Onboarding orchestrator invoked by /signal-onboard: stakeholder-interview -> product-surface-mapping -> belief-seed-generation -> six first-run artifacts

name: stakeholder-interview
description: Structured interview script for onboarding Discovery Briefs — verbatim capture, 9-question sequence

name: product-surface-mapping
description: Surface inventory and Trust Tier classifier for onboarding — emits SURFACE_INVENTORY.md and PERMANENTLY_T3.md

name: belief-seed-generation
description: Seed Belief generator — derives the first 2-week falsifiable Belief from Surface Inventory + Discovery Briefs

name: session-journal
description: Session journal model: the .signalos/sessions/<id>/journal.jsonl append-only surface, the 10 canonical event types, the redaction contract, and how to resume a session.

name: observability-dashboard
description: Static HTML observability dashboard over metrics.jsonl — reading, refreshing, and extending it without introducing Node or a build pipeline.

name: headless-execution
description: When to pick the harness (CI, batch, no editor attached) vs. an editor emitter, and how to wire a step for headless-safe execution.

name: dispatching-parallel-agents
description: How to fan out multiple parallel subagent calls, collect results, and reconcile into a single coherent output without race conditions.

name: subagent-driven-development
description: Architecture pattern for driving a full development cycle (plan -> implement -> review -> merge) via coordinated subagents, each owning a discrete task.

name: compress-context
description: Rule-based 4-layer context compressor: verbatim / summary / headline / discard. Disk-truth is never compressed.

name: plugin-registry
description: cosign-signed tarball registry: install / verify / publish / uninstall. Plugins default to T3.

name: parallel-orchestration
description: Parallel wave orchestration via git worktrees: how to create, dispatch, reconcile, and retire concurrent task branches using signalos orchestrate.

name: intent-router
description: Natural language intent routing — maps free-form phrases to signalos commands with confidence scoring. No LLM call on the routing path.

name: task-schema
description: Machine-readable task schema for PLAN.tasks.yaml — ULID IDs, depends_on, tier, status, render/validate/list CLI commands.

name: operator-tooling
description: Operator tooling: health check, runtime diagnostics, validator suite, hook lifecycle, and checkpoint recovery commands.
